Advent Beam Defense Platform.name: Beam Defense Platform
Advent Beam Defense Platform.description: An array of beam weapons defend nearby structures and the planet from hostile ships.

Advent Crystal Extractor.name: Crystal Extractor
Advent Crystal Extractor.description: Increases Crystal mining rate.\n\nMust be constructed on an available crystal asteroid.

Advent Deliverance Engine.name: Deliverance Engine
Advent Deliverance Engine.description: A potent device capable of projecting the Unity's presence to distant worlds.

Advent Exotic Refinery.name: Exotic Refinery
Advent Exotic Refinery.description: Produces exotic materials by refining raw materials.

Advent Greater Factory.name: Greater Factory
Advent Greater Factory.description: Allows for the construction of cruisers and capital ships. Build multiple factories to construct more ships at the same time.

Advent Hangar Defense.name: Hangar Defense
Advent Hangar Defense.description: Squadrons of strikecraft defend nearby structures and the planet from hostile forces.

Advent Laser Defense Platform.name: Laser Defense Platform
Advent Laser Defense Platform.description: Laser turrets defend nearby structures and the planet from hostile ships.

Advent Lesser Factory.name: Lesser Factory
Advent Lesser Factory.description: Allows for the construction of corvettes and frigates. Build multiple factories to construct more ships at the same time.

Advent Metal Extractor.name: Metal Extractor
Advent Metal Extractor.description: Increases Metal mining rate.\n\nMust be constructed on an available metal asteroid.

Advent Phase Jump Inhibitor.name: Phase Jump Inhibitor
Advent Phase Jump Inhibitor.description: Prevents enemy ships from phase jumping away from this gravity well.

Advent Temple of Communion.name: Temple of Communion
Advent Temple of Communion.description: Spreads the cultural influence of your empire to nearby planets.

Advent Temple of Renewal.name: Temple of Renewal
Advent Temple of Renewal.description: Restores antimatter to friendly ships in orbit over time.

Advent Temple of Unity.name: Temple of Unity
Advent Temple of Unity.description: Provides Unity to unlock and improve Advent global abilities.

Advent Titan Foundry.name: Titan Foundry
Advent Titan Foundry.description: Allows construction of faction specific titans and command ships.

TEC Autocannon Defense Platform.name: Autocannon Defense Platform
TEC Autocannon Defense Platform.description: An array of heavy autocannons defends nearby structures and the planet from low durability hostile ships.

TEC Broadcast Center.name: Broadcast Center
TEC Broadcast Center.description: Spreads the Culture of your empire to nearby planets.

TEC Crystal Extractor.name: Crystal Extractor
TEC Crystal Extractor.description: Increases Crystal mining rate.\n\nMust be constructed on an available crystal asteroid.

TEC Exotic Refinery.name: Exotic Refinery
TEC Exotic Refinery.description: Produces Exotic materials by refining more common raw materials.

TEC Gauss Defense Platform.name: Gauss Defense Platform
TEC Gauss Defense Platform.description: Triple Gauss cannons defend nearby structures and the planet from hostile cruisers and capital ships.

TEC Hangar Defense.name: Hangar Defense
TEC Hangar Defense.description: Squadrons of strikecraft defend nearby structures and the planet from hostile forces.

TEC Heavy Factory.name: Heavy Factory
TEC Heavy Factory.description: Allows the construction of cruisers and capital ships. Build multiple factories to construct more ships at the same time.

TEC Light Factory.name: Light Factory
TEC Light Factory.description: Allows for the construction of frigates and corvettes. Build multiple factories to construct more ships at the same time.

TEC Metal Extractor.name: Metal Extractor
TEC Metal Extractor.description: Increases Metal mining rate.\n\nMust be constructed on an available metal asteroid.

TEC Novalith Cannon.name: Novalith Cannon
TEC Novalith Cannon.description: A weapon of immense power, it is capable of bombarding planets from nearby gravity wells.

TEC Phase Jump Inhibitor.name: Phase Jump Inhibitor
TEC Phase Jump Inhibitor.description: Prevents enemy ships from phase jumping away from this gravity well.

TEC Titan Foundry.name: Titan Foundry
TEC Titan Foundry.description: Allows construction of faction specific titans and command ships.

TEC Trade Port.name: Trade Port
TEC Trade Port.description: Build Trade Ports to increase global Export Points and Export types. Allocate Export Points between Export types to customize your economy. Goods increase credit income while metal and crystal increase resource income.

Vasari Crystal Extractor.name: Crystal Extractor
Vasari Crystal Extractor.description: Increases Crystal mining rate.\n\nMust be constructed on an available crystal asteroid.

Vasari Exotic Refinery.name: Exotic Refinery
Vasari Exotic Refinery.description: Produces exotic materials by refining common raw materials.

Vasari Fleet Beacon.name: Fleet Beacon
Vasari Fleet Beacon.description: Summons stray capital ships to rejoin your fleet. With the appropriate research the beacon can be upgraded to summon an ancient titan from the depths of deep space.

Vasari Metal Extractor.name: Metal Extractor
Vasari Metal Extractor.description: Increases Metal mining rate.\n\nMust be constructed on an available metal asteroid.

Vasari Nano Assembly Factory.name: Nano Assembly Factory
Vasari Nano Assembly Factory.description: Allows for the construction of ships. Build multiple factories to construct more ships at the same time.

Vasari Phase Gate.name: Phase Gate
Vasari Phase Gate.description: Creates a Phase Gate which allows your empire's ships to travel directly between this planet and any other Phase Gate in the star system.

Vasari Phase Jump Inhibitor.name: Phase Jump Inhibitor
Vasari Phase Jump Inhibitor.description: Prevents enemy ships from phase jumping away from this gravity well.

Vasari Phase Missile Platform.name: Phase Missile Platform
Vasari Phase Missile Platform.description: Heavy phase missile launchers defend nearby structures and the planet from hostile cruisers and capital ships.

Vasari Phase Resonator.name: Phase Resonator
Vasari Phase Resonator.description: Build Phase Resonators to increase global Resonance Points. Allocate Resonance Points between mobility, combat and utility to customize transient improvements to your units when they exit phase space.

Vasari Pulse Gun Defense.name: Pulse Gun Defense
Vasari Pulse Gun Defense.description: Heavy pulse gun turrets defend nearby structures and the planet from less durable hostile ships.

Vasari Regeneration Bay.name: Regeneration Bay
Vasari Regeneration Bay.description: Repairs nearby friendly ships over time.

Vasari Xeno Relations Center.name: Xeno Relations Center
Vasari Xeno Relations Center.description: Specialists from the days of the empire revive their expertise in interspecies persuasion and indoctrination.
